title: Bone-chilling preview released for Steven Spielberg's highly anticipated UFO movie 'Disclosure Day'
description: Steven Spielberg's upcoming UFO film "Disclosure Day" drops its final trailer, generating massive buzz ahead of its June 2026 theatrical release.

title: Steven Spielberg is back. With mother of all UFO conspiracies
description: The Disclosure Day trailer features Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Eve Henson and Colin Firth. The film is set for release on 12 June.

title: 'People totally FASCINATED by it...': Trump drops UFO bombshell, hints at more ALIEN files release
description: US President Donald Trump has once again sparked massive speculation around extraterrestrials and UFOs after making explosive remarks during a White House cabinet meeting. Referring to recently released Pentagon UFO files, Trump said the administration is 'releasing a lot of information having to do with extraterrestrial things,' adding that 'people are totally fascinated by it.'

title: The Vatican Weighs In on UFO Discussion as UAP Disclosure Debate Continues to Escalate
description: The Vatican's involvement in UFO discussions marks a cultural shift, as Father Richard D'Souza emphasises the importance of scientific scepticism and faith in understanding unexplained phenomena.

title: Pentagon Releases New UFO Videos, Prompting Biblical Comparisons
description: (NaturalNews) The Trump administration released 46 new UFO videos on May 24, 2026, as part of an ongoing declassification effort ordered by President Donald Trump. ...
